title: Oakestra: From Research Idea to a Growing Community
excerpt: What an exceptional year for Oakestra! Between new research directions, new publications, and prestigious awards, the project has reached incredible milestones. But more importantly, our community is growing stronger every day thanks to amazing people.

title: On-Demand Container Partitioning: How We Made Distributed ML More Efficient
excerpt: A behind-the-scenes look at the ideas behind our USENIX ATC '25 paper on on-demand container partitioning for distributed ML workloads.
